creator: miwi@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


HI, 

For next time please submit patches as a diff (diff -ruN old new). 

Your port patch not correct. 

===>  Cleaning for nano-2.2.1 ===>  Vulnerability check disabled, 
database not found ===>  Extracting for nano-2.2.1 => MD5 Checksum OK 
for nano-2.2.1.tar.gz.  => SHA256 Checksum OK for nano-2.2.1.tar.gz. 
===>  Patching for nano-2.2.1 ===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for 
nano-2.2.1 Ignoring previously applied (or reversed) patch.  1 out of 1 
hunks ignored--saving rejects to doc/syntax/makefile.nanorc.rej => Patch 
patch-doc_syntax_makefile.nanorc failed to apply cleanly.  => Patch(es) 
patch-doc_man_Makefile.in patch-doc_man_fr_Makefile.in 
patch-doc_man_nano.1 applied cleanly.  *** Error code 1 

Stop in /usr/home/miwi/dev/ports/editors/nano.  ===> Error running make 
build ===> Cleaning up 

please fix that and resend a followup. 

THx
